name: northwind
description:
The northwind database stores salaries for the northwind company.
Northwind sells products to other customer companies and buys products from supplier companies.
Northwind employees manage orders and ship products via shippers to customers.

attributes.name: category_id
attributes.label: Id
attributes.comment: A surrogate primary key that uniquely identifies a category.

attributes.name: category_name
attributes.label: Name
attributes.comment: Name of a category

attributes.name: description
attributes.label: Description
attributes.comment: Description of a category

attributes.name: picture
attributes.label: Picture
attributes.comment: A picture to visualize the category

entities.name: customers
entities.label: Customer
entities.comment: Contains information about the company's customers, with fields like company_name, contact_name.

attributes.name: customer_id
attributes.label: Id
attributes.comment: A surrogate primary key used to uniquely identify each customer.

attributes.name: company_name
attributes.label: Name
attributes.comment: The cusomers company name

attributes.name: contact_name
attributes.label: Contact
attributes.comment: Name of a contact person

attributes.name: contact_title
attributes.label: Title
attributes.comment: The title or role the contact person has in the customer company (e.g. Owner, Sales Representative, Marketing Manager).

attributes.name: address
attributes.label: Address
attributes.comment: The first address line of the customer.

attributes.name: city
attributes.label: City
attributes.comment: The city of the customer address.

attributes.name: region
attributes.label: Region
attributes.comment: The region of the customer address.

attributes.name: postal_code
attributes.label: Postal code
attributes.comment: The postal code of the customer address.

attributes.name: country
attributes.label: Country
attributes.comment: The country of the customer address.

attributes.name: phone
attributes.label: Phone
attributes.comment: The telephone number to call the contact person.

attributes.name: mail
attributes.label: Mail
attributes.comment: The mail of the contact person.

entities.name: customer_customer_demo
entities.label: Customer-Demo
entities.comment: Stores the relationships between customer and costomer demographics.

attributes.name: customer_id
attributes.label: Customer Id
attributes.comment: A foreign key identifying the customer.

attributes.name: customer_type_id
attributes.label: Type-Id
attributes.comment: A foreign key identifying the customer demographic.

entities.name: customer_demographics
entities.label: Customer Demographics
entities.comment: A customer democraphics describes customer segments, e.g. Retail, Wholesale, Corporate, etc.

attributes.name: customer_desc
attributes.label: Description
attributes.comment: A description to the customer demographic.

entities.name: employees
entities.label: Employee
entities.comment: Stores employee information, such as their names and titles.

attributes.name: employee_id
attributes.comment: A surrogate primary key used to uniquely identify each employee.

attributes.name: last_name
attributes.label: Last Name
attributes.comment: Last name of employee.

attributes.name: first_name
attributes.label: First Name
attributes.comment: First name of employee.

attributes.name: title

attributes.comment: The title or role the employee has in the company

attributes.name: title_of_courtesy
attributes.label: Courtesy
attributes.comment: The employees courtesy

attributes.name: birth_date
attributes.label: Date of Birth
attributes.comment: The employees date of birth.

attributes.name: hire_date
attributes.label: Hire Date
attributes.comment: The date the employee was hired.

attributes.name: address
attributes.label: Address
attributes.comment: The address line of the employee.

attributes.name: city
attributes.label: City
attributes.comment: The city of the employee address

attributes.name: region
attributes.label: Region
attributes.comment: The region of the employee address.

attributes.name: postal_code
attributes.label: Postal Code
attributes.comment: The postal code of the employee address.

attributes.name: country
attributes.label: Country
attributes.comment: The country of the employee address

attributes.name: home_phone
attributes.label: Phone
attributes.comment: The telephone number of the employee.

attributes.name: photo
attributes.label: Phota
attributes.comment: The portrait photo of the employee

attributes.name: notes
attributes.label: Notes
attributes.comment: Notes to the employee

attributes.name: photo_path
attributes.label: Path
attributes.comment: Path or URL to the photo

entities.name: employee_territories

entities.comment: Stores the relationships between employees and territories.

attributes.name: employee_id
attributes.label: Employee Id
attributes.comment: A foreign key identifying the employee.

attributes.name: territory_id
attributes.label: Territory Id
attributes.comment: A foreign key identifying the territory.

entities.name: orders
entities.label: Order
entities.comment: Holds records of customer orders, including OrderID, OrderDate, and CustomerID.

attributes.name: order_id
attributes.label: Id
attributes.comment: A surrogate primary key used to uniquely identify each order.

attributes.name: required_date
attributes.label: Required Date
attributes.comment: The date the customer requires the order

attributes.name: shipped_date
attributes.label: Shipped Date
attributes.comment: The date the order is shipped.

attributes.name: ship_via
attributes.label: Via
attributes.comment: A foreign key identifying the shipper.

attributes.name: freight
attributes.label: Freight
attributes.comment: The shipping freight.

attributes.name: ship_name
attributes.label: Ship Name
attributes.comment: The name of the company to ship the order to.

attributes.name: ship_address
attributes.label: Ship Address
attributes.comment: The address of the company the ship goes to.

attributes.name: ship_city
attributes.label: Ship City
attributes.comment: The city of the company the ship goes to.

attributes.name: ship_region
attributes.label: Ship Region
attributes.comment: The region of the company the ship goes to.

attributes.name: ship_postal_code
attributes.label: Ship Postal Code
attributes.description: The postal code of the company the ship goes to.

attributes.name: ship_country
attributes.label: Ship Country
attributes.description: The country of the company the ship goes to.

entities.name: order_details
entities.label: Order Details
entities.comment: Links orders to products, detailing which products are included in each order.

attributes.name: unit_price
attributes.label: Unit Price
attributes.comment: The unit price valid to the order.

attributes.name: quantity
attributes.label: Quantity
attributes.comment: The quantity of the order.

attributes.name: discount
attributes.label: Discount
attributes.comment: The discount to the order.

entities.name: products
entities.label: Product
entities.comment: Stores details about products, including name, supplier, category, and unit price.

attributes.name: product_id
attributes.label: Id
attributes.comment: A surrogate primary key used to uniquely identify each product.

attributes.name: product_name
attributes.label: Product name

attributes.name: quantity_per_unit
attributes.label: Quantity per Unit
attributes.comment: The quantity per unit the product is sold.

attributes.name: unit_price
attributes.label: Unit price
attributes.comment: The unit price the product is sold before discount.

attributes.name: units_in_stock
attributes.label: in Stock
attributes.comment: The units in stock.

attributes.name: units_on_order
attributes.label: in Order
attributes.comment: The units on order.

attributes.name: reorder_level
attributes.label: Reoder Level
attributes.comment: Minimum units on stock before ordering new products.

attributes.name: discontinued
attributes.label: Discontinued
attributes.comment: Signs whether the product is discontinued

entities.name: region

entities.comment: The region products are sold to.

attributes.name: region_id
attributes.label: Id
attributes.comment: A surrogate primary key used to uniquely identify each region.

attributes.name: region_description
attributes.label: Description
attributes.comment: A description to the region.

attributes.name: shipper_id

attributes.name: phone
attributes.label: Phone
attributes.comment: The telephone number.

entities.name: suppliers

attributes.name: company_name

attributes.comment: The name of the suppliers company.

attributes.name: contact_name
attributes.label: Contact
attributes.comment: The name of the person to get in contact to the supplier.

attributes.name: country

attributes.name: mail

attributes.name: homepage

attributes.name: territory_description

attributes.name: state_id
attributes.label: Id
attributes.comment: A surrogate primary key used to uniquely identify each state.

links.name: same_product
links.comment: both tables refer to the same product data record

links.name: same_customer_demographic
links.comment: both tables refer to the same customer-demographic data record

links.name: same_shipper
links.comment: both tables refer to the same shipper data record

links.name: root_category_of
links.comment: The category is the topmost root category of the second category
links.description: The link is directed, order of categories matter. The first category is the root category.

links.name: belongs_to_root
links.comment: The category is a direct or indirect subcategory for the second category (root category)
links.description: The link is directed, order of categories matter. The second category is the root category.

links.name: same_supplier
links.comment: both tables refer to the same supplier data record

links.name: same_employee
links.comment: both tables refer to the same employee data record

links.name: same_territory
links.comment: both tables refer to the same territory data record

links.name: same_customer_customer_demo
links.comment: both tables refer to the same customer-demographic data record

links.name: same_us_state
links.comment: both tables refer to the same state data record

links.name: same_region
links.comment: both tables refer to the same region data record

links.name: same_order_detail
links.comment: both tables refer to the same order-detail data record

links.name: reports_to
links.comment: the first employee reports to the second employee.
links.description: The link is directed, order of employees matter. The first employee is team member, the second employee is the supervisor.

links.name: supervisor_of
links.comment: the first employee is supervisor of the second employee.
links.description: The link is directed, order of employees matter. The first employee is team leader, the second employee is team member.

links.name: parent_of
links.comment: this first category is a supercategory of the second.
links.description: The link is directed, order of categories matter. Root categories have no parent categories

links.name: child_of
links.comment: this first category is a subcategory of the second.
links.description: The link is directed, order of categories matter. Root categories have not parent categories

links.name: same_employee_territory
links.comment: both tables refer to the same territory data record

links.name: same_category
links.comment: both tables refer to the same category data record

links.name: same_order
links.comment: both tables refer to the same order data record

links.name: same_customer
links.comment: both tables refer to the same customer data record
